channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Lidl Billionaire Backs Cohere’s Plan to Buy German AI Champion
item.description: Artificial intelligence developer Cohere Inc. has agreed to buy Aleph Alpha, a startup once considered Germany’s national AI champion, in a deal that includes a $600 million investment from German retailer Schwarz Group. [Intel]

item.title: Terafab explained: Elon Musk’s $5 trillion–$13 trillion AI chip megaproject in Texas
item.description: Elon Musk’s Terafab project aims to build massive AI chip fabs in Texas using Intel 14A tech, powering Tesla cars, robots and SpaceX data centres. [Intel, Tesla]

item.title: Intel keeps capex steady as it shifts spending toward capacity expansion
item.description: Intel is holding its 2026 capex broadly flat year over year, not because of reduced ambition, but because of a strategic reallocation of spending toward equipment that directly boosts chip output. Executives signaled that existing factory space is sufficient … [Intel]

item.title: US chipmakers hit record highs as Intel turbocharges AI rally
item.description: American chip stocks hit new peaks on Friday. Intel's strong revenue forecast boosted optimism about the ongoing AI boom. The semiconductor sector is seeing significant earnings growth. Companies like AMD and Arm also saw their shares climb. Nvidia, the world… [Intel, Nvidia, AMD]

item.title: ZTE reports first-quarter revenue of RMB 35.0 billion, up 6% YoY, with computing revenue mix rising to 27%
item.description: AI infrastructure and international growth offset domestic carrier shifts as "Connectivity + Computing" strategy takes hold Partner Content ZTE Corporation (0763.HK / 000063.SZ), a global leading provider of integrated information and communication technology…

item.title: Elon Musk lays out Terafab AI chip project plan
item.description: Elon Musk announced Tesla will utilize Intel's 14A process for its ambitious Terafab chip project in Texas. This advanced complex aims to produce chips for Tesla vehicles, Optimus robots, and AI data centers, with initial research fab construction underway on… [Intel, Tesla]

item.title: Tesla to adopt Intel’s next-gen 14A technology for AI chip manufacturing plan
item.description: The move could make Tesla a key early customer for Intel’s advanced chip technology as both companies expand into AI, robotics and data centre infrastructure. [Intel, Tesla]

item.title: SpaceX plans in-house GPU manufacturing ahead of reported $1.75 trillion IPO
item.description: SpaceX plans to manufacture its own GPUs as part of AI expansion, while warning investors of chip supply risks ahead of its expected IPO filing.

item.title: South East Asia Building Management System (BMS) Industry Report 2026-2034: Surge in Demand for Energy Efficiency, Sustainability Initiatives, and Intelligent Facility Management Drives Expansion
item.description: The South East Asia Building Management System (BMS) market is set for significant growth due to rapid urbanization, smart technology adoption, and sustainability initiatives. The market is projected to expand from US$ 6.51 billion in 2025 to US$ 17.64 billio… [Intel]

item.title: US stock market concentration risk hits extreme levels: AI stocks surge to 45% of S&P 500 market cap in 2026— can $1.4 trillion AI-linked debt sustain this historic dominance?
item.description: US stock market concentration risk hits extreme levels: AI stocks now dominate S&P 500 market cap at a record 45% level in 2026, reflecting a historic shift in US equity markets. Since the launch of ChatGPT, AI-linked companies have surged from nearly 25% to … [OpenAI, ServiceNow]
